taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Cranial Nerve Nuclei and Cerebral Hemispheres

words.clue: Area 44-45 in the left frontal lobe responsible for motor speech
Largest commissure connecting the two cerebral hemispheres
Deep grey matter nuclei including caudate, putamen, and globus pallidus
Arterial anastomosis at the base of the brain formed by ICA and vertebrobasilar systems
Involuntary flinging movements of a limb caused by subthalamic nucleus lesion
Thalamic relay nucleus for all sensory input except olfaction
CN XII nucleus located in the medulla, motor to tongue muscles
Functional column for branchiomotor nerves supplying pharyngeal arch muscles

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the material and try again.
Good effort! Review the areas you missed.
